caption: The video shows two people in a recording studio, viewed from behind. A woman with blonde curly hair wears a black t-shirt with a circular logo featuring a red graphic and the word "RADIO" on the back. She sits facing a man who is also wearing a black t-shirt. The man is wearing headphones and is gesturing with his hands while speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a black desk. On the wall behind him is a large banner with a circular logo matching the one on the woman's shirt. To the right, a yellow-framed mirror reflects the room. The scene remains static across the frames, with only subtle movements from the man's hands and head as he speaks. The lighting is bright and interior, creating a professional podcast or broadcast atmosphere.
